demos.name: chatpulse
demos.use_case: This tool continuously monitors your applications and modules for errors every 20 mins (configurable)). It collects logs from Graylog, classifies failures with AI, and sends alerts (e.g. Slack) so you can fix issues quickly. You configure triggers per project (how often to run) and modules (which products to monitor).

demos.name: demoforge
demos.persona: Sales engineer or pre-sales pod member

demos.name: Campaign Manager Demo
demos.use_case: Send the same offer or update to many recipients at once, with personalized content, then measure delivery and engagement after the send.

demos.name: Personalize Demo
demos.use_case: Event-driven customer profile enrichment and downstream actioning.

demos.name: AI Admin Demo
demos.use_case: Domain-tuned LLM handles routine banking queries (balance, mini-statement, KYC status) and escalates the messy stuff to a human with full conversation context.

demos.name: RCS Demo
demos.use_case: Send a rich RCS card to your contact base and watch the platform fall back to SMS or WhatsApp for handsets that don't support RCS — without you writing any routing logic.

demos.name: CTWA Demo
demos.use_case: Replace a static lead form with a 60-second chat that disqualifies tyre-kickers and books warm leads on the sales calendar.

demos.name: Agent Assist Demo
demos.use_case: Live agent sees AI-suggested replies, customer-history summaries, and intent tags in real time — without leaving the inbox.

demos.name: Bot Studio
demos.use_case: Build a single conversation journey in Bot Studio and deploy it to WhatsApp, Instagram, and the web widget simultaneously — no per-channel rework.

demos.name: General Demo
demos.use_case: A bank wants to understand our Console capabilities and features. A walkthrough of the entire platform is required.
demos.persona: Head of Digital Banking / VP Retail Loans

demos.name: commerce-root-demo
demos.use_case: Launch a fully-managed WhatsApp commerce storefront for a D2C brand — product discovery, AI-led shopping assistant, cart + checkout, abandoned-cart recovery and post-purchase engagement — provisioned end-to-end (WhatsApp templates, journeys, segments, AI agent) from a single Gupshup onboarding flow, with weekly revenue tracking for the pod.
demos.industry: Retail & D2C E-commerce (also applicable to Fashion, Beauty, Grocery, Consumer Electronics).
demos.persona: Head of Digital / Growth at a D2C brand

demos.name: Ctxdemo1
demos.use_case: Re-engage prospects who started a loan application but didn't finish, using WhatsApp to answer questions, collect missing documents, and route to a human banker.
demos.persona: Head of Digital Banking / VP Retail Loans
